mechanism: The rate-FX R-squared regime (8-12% in low vol vs 0-2% in high vol) maps directly to the Dollar Smile zones. Middle zone = low-vol regime where rate differentials drive FX. Left/right sides = high-vol where risk appetite or growth dominance overrides rates.
regime_dependence: Relationship is tautological in the middle zone and breaks down at extremes. Useful only when vol regime can be identified ex ante.
